search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=675" OR ("EventCode=672" AND (Type="Failure Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Failure"))) OR (EventCode=4771 AND (Type="Failure Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Failure")) NOT (User_Name="*$$" OR Account_Name="*$$" OR TargetUserName="*$$") NOT (Error_Code=0x19 OR status=0x19) | eval User_Account=coalesce(User_Name,Account_Name,TargetUserName) | timechart span=1h count

panel.title: Unsuccessful Logins Count By User Account

search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=675" OR ("EventCode=672" AND (Type="Failure Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Failure"))) OR (EventCode=4771 AND (Type="Failure Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Failure")) NOT (User_Name="*$$" OR Account_Name="*$$" OR TargetUserName="*$$") NOT (Error_Code=0x19 OR status=0x19) | eval User_Account=coalesce(User_Name,Account_Name,TargetUserName) | stats count by User_Account | sort 10 -count | rename User_Account AS "User Account"

panel.title: Unsuccessful Logins - Number Of Hosts By User Account

search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=675" OR ("EventCode=672" AND (Type="Failure Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Failure"))) OR (EventCode=4771 AND (Type="Failure Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Failure")) NOT (User_Name="*$$" OR Account_Name="*$$" OR TargetUserName="*$$") NOT (Error_Code=0x19 OR status=0x19) | eval User_Account=coalesce(User_Name,Account_Name,TargetUserName) | stats dc(host) AS "Number of hosts" by User_Account | sort - "Number of hosts" | table User_Account "Number of hosts"
